calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-13-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR. Diana Padilla.
Steve Littman, Esq., for Plaintiff Zach Berkowitz, also present.
Defendant Steve Nicholas present in pro per.
Parties met the chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation, read into the record as follows: Stipulation for entry of judgment or dimissal with prejudice.
Defendant to vacate the premises on or before 9:00 p.m. Feb. 22, 2004, under bloom clean condition, any property left in the premises will be disposed of.
Plaintiff shall dismissed the action with prejudice within 10 days after the defendant vacated.
If Defendant fail to vacate, Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against the defendant for rents, damages and attorney's fees for $3,500.00, upon Ex Parte 24 hrs notice.
Plaintiff is allowed to show the property between the hour of 10 a.m. to 8:00 p.m., with an advance 2 hours telephone notice to the Defendant.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
